kept.text:
⚜️ 39 months ago. Can't believe it...

⚜️ Started posting quotes back in Feb '23 with a crazy idea: Shine the spotlight solely on Crypto Twitter + maybe others would find it valuable + entertaining, too...

⚜️ 10,000 QUOTES LATER...

⚜️ Despite the X algorithm crushing me this past year, thru dedication + sheer insanity, I managed to hit a milestone I never thought possible: 10K crypto + trading community quotes...

⚜️ When/if life ever slows down, I'll create a CT quote database somewhere online, likely accompanied with a newsletter + some other related mania...

⚜️ If I'm being brutally honest, @rektdiomedes has been QC's biggest non-stop supporter, for the entire three + a half years of this account – literally, since week #1. He's quite possibly the most significant small-account bull on CT. Watch him – he's still doing it, to this very day...

⚜️ THX, REKT, for all the RT's, likes, comments + @thedailydegenhq features over the years. I'm a huge fan + I appreciate you immensely...

⚜️ Decided I'm going to ignore the new X algorithm. If I find 10-20 quotes in a day, I'm posting them all, regardless of my algo "punishment." QC is not a spam account. This "2-3 quotes max per day" bullsh!t is over. I now realize that this account will likely never hit 50-100K followers. I'm too niche – and I'm cool with that...

⚜️ There are a few select bros who have consistently gone way above + beyond in support of my account. I appreciate you guys immensely. Mammoth shout-outs to:

@FraserWheaton 🤝🏼
@DrMemellionaire 🤝🏼
@5waps 🤝🏼
@Pingtrades 🤝🏼

⚜️ Onward + upward to 20,000...

⚜️ Despite the stupid "Snooze Topics" target that X put on our backs, Crypto Twitter remains the single greatest community on this app, as WE ARE LITERALLY BUILDING A NEW ASSET CLASS. No other sector on X is on a bigger mission than us...

⚜️ Mega-bullish on our future...

⚜️ Blessings, all...🙏🏻💪🏻QC

profile_bio.description: ⚜️ Archaeologist of Crypto Twitter ⚜️ 10,000+ quotes archived since 2022 ⚜️ CT says it – QC frames it ⚜️
